metadata.summary: A meta-text checklist of questions regarding the manuscript's marketability, including genre, audience, comparable titles, commercial appeal, and literary quality.
semantic_notes: This paragraph is not part of the narrative prose. It is an editorial or authorial checklist related to publishing and market positioning.

The content aligns with themes found in the XML evidence, specifically the document detailing 'Publishing Industry Standards & Master AI Prompt' (Protocol 16.0), which covers topics like market positioning, comp titles, and genre.
